---
title: "Analytical Portfolio - Computational Statistics in R"
subtitle: "Advanced statistical modeling and visualization"
---

# Welcome to the analytical portfolio

I present here practical applications of statistics and the R language in business, financial, and other data analysis. Each of the following projects constitutes a comprehensive case study – from initial data preparation, through hypothesis testing, to the construction of predictive models.

## Projects Overview

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Data exploration and visualization](lab1.qmd)
Stock trend and flight statistics analysis using advanced visualization techniques.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Parameter estimation and distributions](lab2.qmd)
Modeling mass phenomena and statistical inference based on probability distributions.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Statistical hypothesis testing](lab3.qmd)
Verification of statistical significance in clinical trials, industry, and sports.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Regression models and ANOVA](lab4.qmd)
Analysis of multidimensional relationships and business outcome forecasting.
:::

:::


I invite you to explore the detailed reports available in the sidebar menu.
